title: Agent Handoff/Continuation Patterns — Cross-Framework Analysis

documents.description: Comprehensive cross-framework analysis of agent handoff/continuation patterns across LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, MCP, and hummbl-dev governance schemas. Includes gap analysis, integration architecture, and immediate next steps.

sources: LangGraph: checkpointers, stores, interrupts, persistence, memory
CrewAI: unified memory system, scopes/slices, checkpointing, checkpoint config
AutoGen: agent chat, agent handoff tool, MCP workbench, core/agentchat/ext packages

gaps: No runtime validator for agent-handoffs-v0.1 schema
No checkpointer integration for KRINEIA receipt emission
No capability gap ledger reporter (LangGraph store)
No unified HITL protocol (LangGraph interrupt vs CrewAI checkpoint vs AutoGen tool vs MCP elicitation)
